TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pihapiw no Dipong to nicalapan a Taywan. == O kadofahay kinairairaan no Taywan to sakiriyaran a lalan, to hatiniay to lafin no mihecaan 'aloman ko papotalay macacefis micalap a mikowan, nai 1895 mihecaan Makoang telek mapaliyas no Mancin ko Taywan kanatal, Pengho kasakanatal ato salawacay no Dipong a kanatal, saka misatapang to ko Dipong mikowan 50 to'ak no mihecaan itiya. Kalaloodan no Ciawu I 1894 miheca malengat ko Ciawu lalood itiya, satapangan nai Kitacosen (Caosien) a lalood no Azuma haku to (Tongsitang), mitahidang ko Caosien to Mancin to sapadang itiya, milongoc piocor to sofitay mamipalasawad to fangafang, o Dipong sato miocor to sapadama to kaitiraan ato itiraay a finawlan ko sasowalen miocor to sofitay tayra i Caosien. ​Mapaherek ko fangafang miketon ko sofitay no Mancin minokay, nika oya sa a Dipong o sapipatirengaw to kalaloodan at sakairaaw no kicay mana'ay miliyas, milongoc to Caosien to "sapifalic no laloma'ay sademakan", tolo romi'ad i palasawaden ko nikatatelek to Mancin sato. ​Maraod ko tolo romi'ad, patangsoll sa miocor to sofitay ko Dipong micalap to Caosien, mifelih to Caosien no Kosokotei (hongti) a patireng to no Dipong a citodongay sakowan, palasawadan ko polong nikatatelekan to Mancin, patorod to Dipong milaplap to sofitay no Mancin. ​​Itiya o citodongay no Mancin to saki'amisay kakeridan ci Li Hongzhang rarawraw to tina demak, saka palefolefodan sato a miocor to sofitay tayra i Pyongyang, ato pakitamina ko pisera to sofitay tayra i Caosien (North Korea). I 1894 miheca 7 folad 25 romi'ad oya Mancin ato Dipong a tamina itira i Pungdo no Caosien (North Korea) a malalood, parekpek to ko salifong saka onian ko lalengatan no Kalaloodan no Ciawu hananay. 8 folad 1 romi'ad, Cinkong hongti (Sinco no kocotei) mihapiw to sakalalood. ​​​Malengat ko kalaloodan i, mata'elif ko rafas no 30 mihecaan a kasasiimer a onto, nao "saka cecay a Asiya" sanay o ka'amisay sofitay itiya, nika misi'ayaw to caayay ho ka 30 miheca ko Meijiisin a masafa'elohay sofitay ato tamina no Dipong, malowid to malefek ko ka'amisay sofitay. Itira to i sekal ano eca i riyar to ko kalalood i, caay to pakafilo mico'ay ko sofitay no Mancin to sofitay no Dipong a tararikor mapidah, ikor no Guranjiterasu a kalood i, maeminay to makiraromot ko sofitay no Mancin, ikor sato denga sa o paci'eci to kalali'ay masasitelek to Dipong itiya. Makoang a telek mapaliyas ko Taywan ato Penho I 1895 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad, itira i Shunpan biru masasitelek ko Dipong ato Mancin to "Dipong Mancin a Makoang a telek", o pisetek paherek to kalalood no Nisshin. Oni saka tosa liyad masowal, o mamida'oc ko Congko paliyas to Taywan, Penho ato salawacan kanatal pafeli to Dipong. I 5 folad 8 romi'ad, Dipong Mancin masasipaini to haydaan "Nisshin Makoang a telek" a tilid, o Taywan, Penho kanatal ato liyokay kanatal itini ii rikec masongila' ono Dipong to sofal a sera. ​Itiya to pikelac paliyas to Taywan a ratoh pakayni i malali'acaay, roma kitakit mali'acaay tamdaw a nikasasowasowal k nikafana'an, caayho ka cakat ko kasasiratoh syakay no Taywan itiya, 'aloman ho ko finawlan caayho kafana' to o maanan kitakit ko "Dipong". Tona pakatengil ko finawlan tonini a ratoh, maemin calemcem a rarawraw. ​​Masasowasowal to koya tadamaanay no kasaniyaro' a tamdaw, padimpo to ci Tang Jingsong to Mancin, pakafana' kao "Misatatad patireng to kitakit" a kacingangan to sapisiikedaw. Itiya i 1985 miheca 5 folad 23 romi'ad mahapiw to "Hapiw no misatekeday to kitakit niyah ko mikowanay a Taywan", 5 folad 25 romi'ad nisaheci patireng to "Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan". Oya congtong ci Tang Jingsong, micokeray to congtong ci Qiu Fengjia, o kakeridan no sofitay ci Liu Yongfu, pacakat to fayfay kaliyaway lokedaw, kacingangan no miheca o "Yongqing", talacowa kacingangan o Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan, tahada'oc o no Mancin to ko Taywan o sanay. Misa'icel ko Taywan a tamdaw miliyang to pikowan no Dipong a Yimo kalalood I 1895 miheca 5 folad 29 romi'ad, o Kitashirakawanomiyayoshihisa shin'no keridan ko 7000 sofitay no Dipong itira i Ao soko (Au di) talasekal mirepet to Taywan, miteka ko "Yimo lalood" itiya, nanoya sa ko lalood, oya Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan kohetingay fayfay a sofitay, caay pakafilo to tena' pilood no Dipong i niyaro' no Taypak. Saka 6 folad 4 romi'ad, caayen to pakafilo ci Tang Jingsong to nika tadamaan sakalalood no Dipong, nikafalic sato mato'asay fafahiyan padadaya sa a milaliw, caay ka halafin, oya micokeray a congtong ci Qiu Fengjia losimet sato payso a milaliw. ​Tatootoor sa milaliw to niyaro' no Taypak koya kakeridan ato citodongay, awaayen to ko kakeridan koya sofitay, oya sofitay sato matiya o tatiihay a tamdaw miteka a mitodoh to niyaro' micefis to dafong, sararawraw sato ko niyaro' no Taypak itiya. ​​I 1895 miheca 6 folad 7 romi'ad, o kakitaan no niyaro' masasowasowal mioocor to dayhiw ci "Gu Xianrongan", mifohat to fawahan mihamham to picomod sofitay no Dipong, nanoya sa mahemhem ko rarawraway itiya. micada ko Dipong to Taypak itiya i, toya miheca 6 folad 14 romi'ad midemak to "pitekaan mikowan a lisin". ​​​I 1895 miheca 6 folad pasitimol to ko sofitay no Dipong, malitemoh to ko "toloay tadamaay a Ngayngay, toloay kiemelay Payrang" a miliyangay tamdaw. toya miheca 8 folad 27 romi'ad ira ko kalingsesan lalood "Baguasan lalood", mata'elif ko 8 tokian ko fangafang, i 28 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok 10 ko toki malowid ko Dipong a mihapiw. ​​​​Ikor no lalood misi'ayaw kairairaay sakalalood no Dipong, talacowa misa'icel koya Giyugun ato kohetingay fayfay sofitay mico'ay i, hato caay pakalowid to kiemelay sakalalood. Toya mihecaan 10 folad keriden ni Liu Yongfu koya 'osaw sofitay itira i Taynan malitolo mico'ay, caayto pakafilo to ki'emelay sofitay no Dipong, saka sawad sato ci Liu Yongfu to sofitay finawlan to niyaro' no Taynan, milaliw to tayra i Xiamen no Congko. ​​​​​Tadamaanay tamdaw no Taynan mikilim to matiyaay no Taypak micikeroh to foksi no Inkiris ci Barclay aci Song Zhongjian maladayhiw, milongoc to sofitay no Dipong o rihadayay ko picomod to niyaro' no Taynan, padama to sakasi'eror no finawlan. I 10 folad 21 romi'ad, sanga'ay sato ko sofitay no Dipong micomod to niyaro' no Taynan, oya celak sanay ho a "Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan" nanoyaan sato matekop. Pitekaan no Dipong micalap a to'ek ​Mitekop koya Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan i, oya 'osaw sofitay no Giyugun ato kohetingay fayfay sofitay, talacowa ira ko sararay kasasiwtoc nika awaay ko 'icel miliyang to sofitay no dipong. O sarakatay Sotoku no Dipong i Taywan ci Kabayama Masanori i 11 folad 18 romi'ad pasi Kyoto paini to ratoh: "Ma'emin to maparekrek ko finawlan no kanatal". Mihapiw to paherek lalood no Yimo, rafasay 5 foladan ko lallod itiya. ​​I 1896 miheca 2 folad 3 romi'ad, Sotoku i Taywan a citodongay to demak (mincenci) paratoh to kasakitakit a citodongay to demak i Taywan, miratoh o Taywan mala o "Saka cecay micalapan a sera", nai pitekaan tangasa 50 mihecaan ko "picalap to'ek no Dipong" i Taywan. Misilsilay mikawit ci Wu Shengxian (Sin taiwan heping kikingkay a cuanyien) ===== Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar =====
S.PHON: == piħapiw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u niʦaɾapan a tajwan. == o~u kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħaj kinairairaan no~u tajwan to~u sakirijaran a ɾaɾan, to~u ħatiniaj to~u ɾafin no~u miħəʦaan ʡaɾo~uman ko~u papo~utaɾaj maʦaʦəfis miʦaɾap a miko~uwan, nai **** miħəʦaan mako~uaŋ təɾək mapaɾijas no~u manʦin ko~u tajwan kanataɾ, pəŋħo~u kasakanataɾ ato~u saɾawaʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kanataɾ, saka misatapaŋ to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miko~uwan ** to~uʡak no~u miħəʦaan itija. kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ʦiawo~u~u i **** miħəʦa maɾəŋat ko~u ʦiawo~u~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija, satapaŋan nai kitaʦo~usən (ʦao~usiən) a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u a*o~u~uma ħako~u~u to~u (to~uŋsitaŋ), mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u ʦao~usiən to~u manʦin to~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ itija, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ pio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj mamipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u faŋafaŋ, o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sato~u mio~uʦo~ur to~u sapaɬ~ɮama to~u kaitiraan ato~u itiraaj a finawɾan ko~u saso~uwaɾən mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj tajra i ʦao~usiən. *mapaħərək ko~u faŋafaŋ mikəto~un ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin mino~ukaj, nika o~uja sa a ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u sapipatirəŋaw to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan at sakairaaw no~u kiʦaj manaʡaj miɾijas, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ʦao~usiən to~u "sapifaɾiʦ no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡaj saɬ~ɮəmakan", to~uɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u nikatatəɾək to~u manʦin sato~u. *marao~uɬ~ɮ ko~u to~uɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pataŋso~uɾɾ sa mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap to~u ʦao~usiən, mifəɾiħ to~u ʦao~usiən no~u ko~uso~uko~utəi (ħo~uŋti) a patirəŋ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sako~uwan, paɾasawaɬ~ɮan ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ nikatatəɾəkan to~u manʦin, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɾapɾap to~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin. **itija o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u manʦin to~u sakiʡamisaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾi ħo~uŋ*ħaŋ rarawraw to~u tina ɬ~ɮəmak, saka paɾəfo~uɾəfo~uɬ~ɮan sato~u a mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj tajra i pjo~uŋjaŋ, ato~u pakitamina ko~u pisəra to~u so~ufitaj tajra i ʦao~usiən (no~urtħ ko~urəa). i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~uja manʦin ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamina itira i po~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u no~u ʦao~usiən (no~urtħ ko~urəa) a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, parəkpək to~u ko~u saɾifo~uŋ saka o~unian ko~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ʦiawo~u~u ħananaj. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦinko~uŋ ħo~uŋti (sinʦo~u no~u ko~uʦo~utəi) miħapiw to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. ***maɾəŋat ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan i, mataʡəɾif ko~u rafas no~u ** miħəʦaan a kasasiimər a o~unto~u, nao~u "saka ʦəʦaj a asija" sanaj o~u kaʡamisaj so~ufitaj itija, nika misiʡajaw to~u ʦaajaj ħo~u ka ** miħəʦa ko~u məijiisin a masafaʡəɾo~uħaj so~ufitaj ato~u tamina no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u maɾəfək ko~u kaʡamisaj so~ufitaj. itira to~u i səkaɾ ano~u əʦa i rijar to~u ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, ʦaaj to~u pakafiɾo~u miʦo~uʡaj ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tarariko~ur mapiɬ~ɮaħ, iko~ur no~u *o~u~uranjitəraso~u~u a kaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, maəminaj to~u makiraro~umo~ut ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, iko~ur sato~u ɬ~ɮəŋa sa o~u paʦiʡəʦi to~u kaɾaɾiʡaj masasitəɾək to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija. mako~uaŋ a təɾək mapaɾijas ko~u tajwan ato~u pənħo~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itira i sħo~u~unpan b~b~viro~u~u masasitəɾək ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u manʦin to~u "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin a mako~uaŋ a təɾək", o~u pisətək paħərək to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nissħin. o~uni saka to~usa ɾijaɬ~ɮ maso~uwaɾ, o~u mamiɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u paɾijas to~u tajwan, pənħo~u ato~u saɾawaʦan kanataɾ pafəɾi to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin masasipaini to~u ħajɬ~ɮaan "nissħin mako~uaŋ a təɾək" a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u tajwan, pənħo~u kanataɾ ato~u ɾijo~ukaj kanataɾ itini ii rikəʦ maso~uŋiɾaʡ o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u so~ufaɾ a səra. *itija to~u pikəɾaʦ paɾijas to~u tajwan a rato~uħ pakajni i maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj, ro~uma kitakit maɾiʡaʦaaj tamɬ~ɮaw a nikasaso~uwaso~uwaɾ k nikafanaʡan, ʦaajħo~u ka ʦakat ko~u kasasirato~uħ sjakaj no~u tajwan itija, ʡaɾo~uman ħo~u ko~u finawɾan ʦaajħo~u kafanaʡ to~u o~u maanan kitakit ko~u "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ". to~una pakatəŋiɾ ko~u finawɾan to~unini a rato~uħ, maəmin ʦaɾəmʦəm a rarawraw. **masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u ko~uja taɬ~ɮamaanaj no~u kasanijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɬ~ɮimpo~u to~u ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ to~u manʦin, pakafanaʡ kao~u "misatataɬ~ɮ patirəŋ to~u kitakit" a kaʦiŋaŋan to~u sapisiikəɬ~ɮaw. itija i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maħapiw to~u "ħapiw no~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj to~u kitakit nijaħ ko~u miko~uwanaj a tajwan", * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ nisaħəʦi patirəŋ to~u "nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan". o~uja ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ, miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *io~u~u fəŋjia, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u so~ufitaj ʦi ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u, paʦakat to~u fajfaj kaɾijawaj ɾo~ukəɬ~ɮaw, kaʦiŋaŋan no~u miħəʦa o~u "jo~uŋ*iŋ", taɾaʦo~uwa kaʦiŋaŋan o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan, taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ o~u no~u manʦin to~u ko~u tajwan o~u sanaj. misaʡiʦəɾ ko~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ to~u piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a jimo~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kitasħirakawano~umijajo~usħiħisa sħinʡno~u kəriɬ~ɮan ko~u **** so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itira i ao~u so~uko~u (ao~u~u ɬ~ɮi) taɾasəkaɾ mirəpət to~u tajwan, mitəka ko~u "jimo~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ" itija, nano~uja sa ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uja nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj a so~ufitaj, ʦaaj pakafiɾo~u to~u tənaʡ piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpak. saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦaajən to~u pakafiɾo~u ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ to~u nika taɬ~ɮamaan sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nikafaɾiʦ sato~u mato~uʡasaj fafaħijan paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja sa a miɾaɾiw, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin, o~uja miʦo~ukəraj a ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *io~u~u fəŋjia ɾo~usimət sato~u pajso~u a miɾaɾiw. *tato~uo~uto~uo~ur sa miɾaɾiw to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpak ko~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, awaajən to~u ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ko~uja so~ufitaj, o~uja so~ufitaj sato~u matija o~u tatiiħaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mitəka a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ to~u nijaro~uʡ miʦəfis to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, sararawraw sato~u ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpak itija. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ mio~uo~uʦo~ur to~u ɬ~ɮajħiw ʦi "*o~u~u xianro~uŋan", mifo~uħat to~u fawaħan miħamħam to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nano~uja sa maħəmħəm ko~u rarawrawaj itija. miʦaɬ~ɮa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajpak itija i, to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "pitəkaan miko~uwan a ɾisin". ***i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ pasitimo~uɾ to~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, maɾitəmo~uħ to~u ko~u "to~uɾo~uaj taɬ~ɮamaaj a ŋajŋaj, to~uɾo~uaj kiəməɾaj pajraŋ" a miɾijaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw. to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u kaɾiŋsəsan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ "b~b~va*o~u~uasan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ", mataʡəɾif ko~u * to~ukian ko~u faŋafaŋ, i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk ** ko~u to~uki maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miħapiw. ****iko~ur no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ misiʡajaw kairairaaj sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa misaʡiʦəɾ ko~uja *ijo~u~u*o~u~un ato~u ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj so~ufitaj miʦo~uʡaj i, ħato~u ʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u kiəməɾaj sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. to~uja miħəʦaan ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ kəriɬ~ɮən ni ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u ko~uja ʡo~usaw so~ufitaj itira i tajnan maɾito~uɾo~u miʦo~uʡaj, ʦaajto~u pakafiɾo~u to~u kiʡəməɾaj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka sawaɬ~ɮ sato~u ʦi ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u to~u so~ufitaj finawɾan to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, miɾaɾiw to~u tajra i xiamən no~u ʦo~uŋko~u. *****taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajnan mikiɾim to~u matijaaj no~u tajpak miʦikəro~uħ to~u fo~uksi no~u inkiris ʦi b~b~varʦɾaj aʦi so~uŋ *ħo~uŋjian maɾaɬ~ɮajħiw, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u riħaɬ~ɮajaj ko~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, paɬ~ɮama to~u sakasiʡəro~ur no~u finawɾan. i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, o~uja ʦəɾak sanaj ħo~u a "nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan" nano~ujaan sato~u matəko~up. pitəkaan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap a to~uʡək *mitəko~up ko~uja nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan i, o~uja ʡo~usaw so~ufitaj no~u *ijo~u~u*o~u~un ato~u ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj so~ufitaj, taɾaʦo~uwa ira ko~u sararaj kasasiwto~uʦ nika awaaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ miɾijaŋ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. o~u sarakataj so~uto~uko~u~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i tajwan ʦi kab~b~vajama masano~uri i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pasi kjo~uto~u paini to~u rato~uħ: "maʡəmin to~u maparəkrək ko~u finawɾan no~u kanataɾ". miħapiw to~u paħərək ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u jimo~u, rafasaj * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan ko~u ɾaɾɾo~uɬ~ɮ itija. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, so~uto~uko~u~u i tajwan a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak (minʦənʦi) parato~uħ to~u kasakitakit a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak i tajwan, mirato~uħ o~u tajwan maɾa o~u "saka ʦəʦaj miʦaɾapan a səra", nai pitəkaan taŋasa ** miħəʦaan ko~u "piʦaɾap to~uʡək no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ" i tajwan. misiɾsiɾaj mikawit ʦi wo~u~u sħəŋxian (sin taiwan ħəpiŋ kikiŋkaj a ʦo~u~uanjiən) ===== mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar =====
S.FORM: == Pihapiw no Dipong to nicalapan a Taywan. == O kadofahay kinairairaan no Taywan to sakiriyaran a lalan, to hatiniay to lafin no mihecaan 'aloman ko papotalay macacefis micalap a mikowan, nai 1895 mihecaan Makoang telek mapaliyas no Mancin ko Taywan kanatal, Pengho kasakanatal ato salawacay no Dipong a kanatal, saka misatapang to ko Dipong mikowan 50 to'ak no mihecaan itiya. Kalaloodan no Ciawu I 1894 miheca malengat ko Ciawu lalood itiya, satapangan nai Kitacosen (Caosien) a lalood no Azuma haku to (Tongsitang), mitahidang ko Caosien to Mancin to sapadang itiya, milongoc piocor to sofitay mamipalasawad to fangafang, o Dipong sato miocor to sapadama to kaitiraan ato itiraay a finawlan ko sasowalen miocor to sofitay tayra i Caosien. ​Mapaherek ko fangafang miketon ko sofitay no Mancin minokay, nika oya sa a Dipong o sapipatirengaw to kalaloodan at sakairaaw no kicay mana'ay miliyas, milongoc to Caosien to "sapifalic no laloma'ay sademakan", tolo romi'ad i palasawaden ko nikatatelek to Mancin sato. ​Maraod ko tolo romi'ad, patangsoll sa miocor to sofitay ko Dipong micalap to Caosien, mifelih to Caosien no Kosokotei (hongti) a patireng to no Dipong a citodongay sakowan, palasawadan ko polong nikatatelekan to Mancin, patorod to Dipong milaplap to sofitay no Mancin. ​​Itiya o citodongay no Mancin to saki'amisay kakeridan ci Li Hongzhang rarawraw to tina demak, saka palefolefodan sato a miocor to sofitay tayra i Pyongyang, ato pakitamina ko pisera to sofitay tayra i Caosien (North Korea). I 1894 miheca 7 folad 25 romi'ad oya Mancin ato Dipong a tamina itira i Pungdo no Caosien (North Korea) a malalood, parekpek to ko salifong saka onian ko lalengatan no Kalaloodan no Ciawu hananay. 8 folad 1 romi'ad, Cinkong hongti (Sinco no kocotei) mihapiw to sakalalood. ​​​Malengat ko kalaloodan i, mata'elif ko rafas no 30 mihecaan a kasasiimer a onto, nao "saka cecay a Asiya" sanay o ka'amisay sofitay itiya, nika misi'ayaw to caayay ho ka 30 miheca ko Meijiisin a masafa'elohay sofitay ato tamina no Dipong, malowid to malefek ko ka'amisay sofitay. Itira to i sekal ano eca i riyar to ko kalalood i, caay to pakafilo mico'ay ko sofitay no Mancin to sofitay no Dipong a tararikor mapidah, ikor no Guranjiterasu a kalood i, maeminay to makiraromot ko sofitay no Mancin, ikor sato denga sa o paci'eci to kalali'ay masasitelek to Dipong itiya. Makoang a telek mapaliyas ko Taywan ato Penho I 1895 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad, itira i Shunpan biru masasitelek ko Dipong ato Mancin to "Dipong Mancin a Makoang a telek", o pisetek paherek to kalalood no Nisshin. Oni saka tosa liyad masowal, o mamida'oc ko Congko paliyas to Taywan, Penho ato salawacan kanatal pafeli to Dipong. I 5 folad 8 romi'ad, Dipong Mancin masasipaini to haydaan "Nisshin Makoang a telek" a tilid, o Taywan, Penho kanatal ato liyokay kanatal itini ii rikec masongila' ono Dipong to sofal a sera. ​Itiya to pikelac paliyas to Taywan a ratoh pakayni i malali'acaay, roma kitakit mali'acaay tamdaw a nikasasowasowal k nikafana'an, caayho ka cakat ko kasasiratoh syakay no Taywan itiya, 'aloman ho ko finawlan caayho kafana' to o maanan kitakit ko "Dipong". Tona pakatengil ko finawlan tonini a ratoh, maemin calemcem a rarawraw. ​​Masasowasowal to koya tadamaanay no kasaniyaro' a tamdaw, padimpo to ci Tang Jingsong to Mancin, pakafana' kao "Misatatad patireng to kitakit" a kacingangan to sapisiikedaw. Itiya i 1985 miheca 5 folad 23 romi'ad mahapiw to "Hapiw no misatekeday to kitakit niyah ko mikowanay a Taywan", 5 folad 25 romi'ad nisaheci patireng to "Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan". Oya congtong ci Tang Jingsong, micokeray to congtong ci Qiu Fengjia, o kakeridan no sofitay ci Liu Yongfu, pacakat to fayfay kaliyaway lokedaw, kacingangan no miheca o "Yongqing", talacowa kacingangan o Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan, tahada'oc o no Mancin to ko Taywan o sanay. Misa'icel ko Taywan a tamdaw miliyang to pikowan no Dipong a Yimo kalalood I 1895 miheca 5 folad 29 romi'ad, o Kitashirakawanomiyayoshihisa shin'no keridan ko 7000 sofitay no Dipong itira i Ao soko (Au di) talasekal mirepet to Taywan, miteka ko "Yimo lalood" itiya, nanoya sa ko lalood, oya Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan kohetingay fayfay a sofitay, caay pakafilo to tena' pilood no Dipong i niyaro' no Taypak. Saka 6 folad 4 romi'ad, caayen to pakafilo ci Tang Jingsong to nika tadamaan sakalalood no Dipong, nikafalic sato mato'asay fafahiyan padadaya sa a milaliw, caay ka halafin, oya micokeray a congtong ci Qiu Fengjia losimet sato payso a milaliw. ​Tatootoor sa milaliw to niyaro' no Taypak koya kakeridan ato citodongay, awaayen to ko kakeridan koya sofitay, oya sofitay sato matiya o tatiihay a tamdaw miteka a mitodoh to niyaro' micefis to dafong, sararawraw sato ko niyaro' no Taypak itiya. ​​I 1895 miheca 6 folad 7 romi'ad, o kakitaan no niyaro' masasowasowal mioocor to dayhiw ci "Gu Xianrongan", mifohat to fawahan mihamham to picomod sofitay no Dipong, nanoya sa mahemhem ko rarawraway itiya. micada ko Dipong to Taypak itiya i, toya miheca 6 folad 14 romi'ad midemak to "pitekaan mikowan a lisin". ​​​I 1895 miheca 6 folad pasitimol to ko sofitay no Dipong, malitemoh to ko "toloay tadamaay a Ngayngay, toloay kiemelay Payrang" a miliyangay tamdaw. toya miheca 8 folad 27 romi'ad ira ko kalingsesan lalood "Baguasan lalood", mata'elif ko 8 tokian ko fangafang, i 28 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok 10 ko toki malowid ko Dipong a mihapiw. ​​​​Ikor no lalood misi'ayaw kairairaay sakalalood no Dipong, talacowa misa'icel koya Giyugun ato kohetingay fayfay sofitay mico'ay i, hato caay pakalowid to kiemelay sakalalood. Toya mihecaan 10 folad keriden ni Liu Yongfu koya 'osaw sofitay itira i Taynan malitolo mico'ay, caayto pakafilo to ki'emelay sofitay no Dipong, saka sawad sato ci Liu Yongfu to sofitay finawlan to niyaro' no Taynan, milaliw to tayra i Xiamen no Congko. ​​​​​Tadamaanay tamdaw no Taynan mikilim to matiyaay no Taypak micikeroh to foksi no Inkiris ci Barclay aci Song Zhongjian maladayhiw, milongoc to sofitay no Dipong o rihadayay ko picomod to niyaro' no Taynan, padama to sakasi'eror no finawlan. I 10 folad 21 romi'ad, sanga'ay sato ko sofitay no Dipong micomod to niyaro' no Taynan, oya celak sanay ho a "Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan" nanoyaan sato matekop. Pitekaan no Dipong micalap a to'ek ​Mitekop koya Nikapolongan kitakit a Taywan i, oya 'osaw sofitay no Giyugun ato kohetingay fayfay sofitay, talacowa ira ko sararay kasasiwtoc nika awaay ko 'icel miliyang to sofitay no dipong. O sarakatay Sotoku no Dipong i Taywan ci Kabayama Masanori i 11 folad 18 romi'ad pasi Kyoto paini to ratoh: "Ma'emin to maparekrek ko finawlan no kanatal". Mihapiw to paherek lalood no Yimo, rafasay 5 foladan ko lallod itiya. ​​I 1896 miheca 2 folad 3 romi'ad, Sotoku i Taywan a citodongay to demak (mincenci) paratoh to kasakitakit a citodongay to demak i Taywan, miratoh o Taywan mala o "Saka cecay micalapan a sera", nai pitekaan tangasa 50 mihecaan ko "picalap to'ek no Dipong" i Taywan. Misilsilay mikawit ci Wu Shengxian (Sin taiwan heping kikingkay a cuanyien) ===== Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar =====
S.PHON: == piħapiw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u niʦaɾapan a tajwan. == o~u kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħaj kinairairaan no~u tajwan to~u sakirijaran a ɾaɾan, to~u ħatiniaj to~u ɾafin no~u miħəʦaan ʡaɾo~uman ko~u papo~utaɾaj maʦaʦəfis miʦaɾap a miko~uwan, nai **** miħəʦaan mako~uaŋ təɾək mapaɾijas no~u manʦin ko~u tajwan kanataɾ, pəŋħo~u kasakanataɾ ato~u saɾawaʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kanataɾ, saka misatapaŋ to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miko~uwan ** to~uʡak no~u miħəʦaan itija. kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ʦiawo~u~u i **** miħəʦa maɾəŋat ko~u ʦiawo~u~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija, satapaŋan nai kitaʦo~usən (ʦao~usiən) a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u a*o~u~uma ħako~u~u to~u (to~uŋsitaŋ), mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u ʦao~usiən to~u manʦin to~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ itija, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ pio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj mamipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u faŋafaŋ, o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sato~u mio~uʦo~ur to~u sapaɬ~ɮama to~u kaitiraan ato~u itiraaj a finawɾan ko~u saso~uwaɾən mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj tajra i ʦao~usiən. *mapaħərək ko~u faŋafaŋ mikəto~un ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin mino~ukaj, nika o~uja sa a ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u sapipatirəŋaw to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan at sakairaaw no~u kiʦaj manaʡaj miɾijas, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ʦao~usiən to~u "sapifaɾiʦ no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡaj saɬ~ɮəmakan", to~uɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u nikatatəɾək to~u manʦin sato~u. *marao~uɬ~ɮ ko~u to~uɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pataŋso~uɾɾ sa mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap to~u ʦao~usiən, mifəɾiħ to~u ʦao~usiən no~u ko~uso~uko~utəi (ħo~uŋti) a patirəŋ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sako~uwan, paɾasawaɬ~ɮan ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ nikatatəɾəkan to~u manʦin, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɾapɾap to~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin. **itija o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u manʦin to~u sakiʡamisaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾi ħo~uŋ*ħaŋ rarawraw to~u tina ɬ~ɮəmak, saka paɾəfo~uɾəfo~uɬ~ɮan sato~u a mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj tajra i pjo~uŋjaŋ, ato~u pakitamina ko~u pisəra to~u so~ufitaj tajra i ʦao~usiən (no~urtħ ko~urəa). i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~uja manʦin ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamina itira i po~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u no~u ʦao~usiən (no~urtħ ko~urəa) a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, parəkpək to~u ko~u saɾifo~uŋ saka o~unian ko~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ʦiawo~u~u ħananaj. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦinko~uŋ ħo~uŋti (sinʦo~u no~u ko~uʦo~utəi) miħapiw to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. ***maɾəŋat ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan i, mataʡəɾif ko~u rafas no~u ** miħəʦaan a kasasiimər a o~unto~u, nao~u "saka ʦəʦaj a asija" sanaj o~u kaʡamisaj so~ufitaj itija, nika misiʡajaw to~u ʦaajaj ħo~u ka ** miħəʦa ko~u məijiisin a masafaʡəɾo~uħaj so~ufitaj ato~u tamina no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u maɾəfək ko~u kaʡamisaj so~ufitaj. itira to~u i səkaɾ ano~u əʦa i rijar to~u ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, ʦaaj to~u pakafiɾo~u miʦo~uʡaj ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tarariko~ur mapiɬ~ɮaħ, iko~ur no~u *o~u~uranjitəraso~u~u a kaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, maəminaj to~u makiraro~umo~ut ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, iko~ur sato~u ɬ~ɮəŋa sa o~u paʦiʡəʦi to~u kaɾaɾiʡaj masasitəɾək to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija. mako~uaŋ a təɾək mapaɾijas ko~u tajwan ato~u pənħo~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itira i sħo~u~unpan b~b~viro~u~u masasitəɾək ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u manʦin to~u "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin a mako~uaŋ a təɾək", o~u pisətək paħərək to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u nissħin. o~uni saka to~usa ɾijaɬ~ɮ maso~uwaɾ, o~u mamiɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u paɾijas to~u tajwan, pənħo~u ato~u saɾawaʦan kanataɾ pafəɾi to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin masasipaini to~u ħajɬ~ɮaan "nissħin mako~uaŋ a təɾək" a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u tajwan, pənħo~u kanataɾ ato~u ɾijo~ukaj kanataɾ itini ii rikəʦ maso~uŋiɾaʡ o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u so~ufaɾ a səra. *itija to~u pikəɾaʦ paɾijas to~u tajwan a rato~uħ pakajni i maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj, ro~uma kitakit maɾiʡaʦaaj tamɬ~ɮaw a nikasaso~uwaso~uwaɾ k nikafanaʡan, ʦaajħo~u ka ʦakat ko~u kasasirato~uħ sjakaj no~u tajwan itija, ʡaɾo~uman ħo~u ko~u finawɾan ʦaajħo~u kafanaʡ to~u o~u maanan kitakit ko~u "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ". to~una pakatəŋiɾ ko~u finawɾan to~unini a rato~uħ, maəmin ʦaɾəmʦəm a rarawraw. **masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u ko~uja taɬ~ɮamaanaj no~u kasanijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɬ~ɮimpo~u to~u ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ to~u manʦin, pakafanaʡ kao~u "misatataɬ~ɮ patirəŋ to~u kitakit" a kaʦiŋaŋan to~u sapisiikəɬ~ɮaw. itija i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maħapiw to~u "ħapiw no~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj to~u kitakit nijaħ ko~u miko~uwanaj a tajwan", * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ nisaħəʦi patirəŋ to~u "nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan". o~uja ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ, miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *io~u~u fəŋjia, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u so~ufitaj ʦi ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u, paʦakat to~u fajfaj kaɾijawaj ɾo~ukəɬ~ɮaw, kaʦiŋaŋan no~u miħəʦa o~u "jo~uŋ*iŋ", taɾaʦo~uwa kaʦiŋaŋan o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan, taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ o~u no~u manʦin to~u ko~u tajwan o~u sanaj. misaʡiʦəɾ ko~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ to~u piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a jimo~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kitasħirakawano~umijajo~usħiħisa sħinʡno~u kəriɬ~ɮan ko~u **** so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itira i ao~u so~uko~u (ao~u~u ɬ~ɮi) taɾasəkaɾ mirəpət to~u tajwan, mitəka ko~u "jimo~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ" itija, nano~uja sa ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uja nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj a so~ufitaj, ʦaaj pakafiɾo~u to~u tənaʡ piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpak. saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦaajən to~u pakafiɾo~u ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ to~u nika taɬ~ɮamaan sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nikafaɾiʦ sato~u mato~uʡasaj fafaħijan paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja sa a miɾaɾiw, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin, o~uja miʦo~ukəraj a ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *io~u~u fəŋjia ɾo~usimət sato~u pajso~u a miɾaɾiw. *tato~uo~uto~uo~ur sa miɾaɾiw to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpak ko~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, awaajən to~u ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ko~uja so~ufitaj, o~uja so~ufitaj sato~u matija o~u tatiiħaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mitəka a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ to~u nijaro~uʡ miʦəfis to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, sararawraw sato~u ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpak itija. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ mio~uo~uʦo~ur to~u ɬ~ɮajħiw ʦi "*o~u~u xianro~uŋan", mifo~uħat to~u fawaħan miħamħam to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nano~uja sa maħəmħəm ko~u rarawrawaj itija. miʦaɬ~ɮa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajpak itija i, to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "pitəkaan miko~uwan a ɾisin". ***i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ pasitimo~uɾ to~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, maɾitəmo~uħ to~u ko~u "to~uɾo~uaj taɬ~ɮamaaj a ŋajŋaj, to~uɾo~uaj kiəməɾaj pajraŋ" a miɾijaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw. to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u kaɾiŋsəsan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ "b~b~va*o~u~uasan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ", mataʡəɾif ko~u * to~ukian ko~u faŋafaŋ, i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk ** ko~u to~uki maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miħapiw. ****iko~ur no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ misiʡajaw kairairaaj sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa misaʡiʦəɾ ko~uja *ijo~u~u*o~u~un ato~u ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj so~ufitaj miʦo~uʡaj i, ħato~u ʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u kiəməɾaj sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. to~uja miħəʦaan ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ kəriɬ~ɮən ni ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u ko~uja ʡo~usaw so~ufitaj itira i tajnan maɾito~uɾo~u miʦo~uʡaj, ʦaajto~u pakafiɾo~u to~u kiʡəməɾaj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka sawaɬ~ɮ sato~u ʦi ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u to~u so~ufitaj finawɾan to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, miɾaɾiw to~u tajra i xiamən no~u ʦo~uŋko~u. *****taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajnan mikiɾim to~u matijaaj no~u tajpak miʦikəro~uħ to~u fo~uksi no~u inkiris ʦi b~b~varʦɾaj aʦi so~uŋ *ħo~uŋjian maɾaɬ~ɮajħiw, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u riħaɬ~ɮajaj ko~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, paɬ~ɮama to~u sakasiʡəro~ur no~u finawɾan. i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, o~uja ʦəɾak sanaj ħo~u a "nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan" nano~ujaan sato~u matəko~up. pitəkaan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap a to~uʡək *mitəko~up ko~uja nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a tajwan i, o~uja ʡo~usaw so~ufitaj no~u *ijo~u~u*o~u~un ato~u ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj so~ufitaj, taɾaʦo~uwa ira ko~u sararaj kasasiwto~uʦ nika awaaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ miɾijaŋ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. o~u sarakataj so~uto~uko~u~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i tajwan ʦi kab~b~vajama masano~uri i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pasi kjo~uto~u paini to~u rato~uħ: "maʡəmin to~u maparəkrək ko~u finawɾan no~u kanataɾ". miħapiw to~u paħərək ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u jimo~u, rafasaj * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan ko~u ɾaɾɾo~uɬ~ɮ itija. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, so~uto~uko~u~u i tajwan a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak (minʦənʦi) parato~uħ to~u kasakitakit a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak i tajwan, mirato~uħ o~u tajwan maɾa o~u "saka ʦəʦaj miʦaɾapan a səra", nai pitəkaan taŋasa ** miħəʦaan ko~u "piʦaɾap to~uʡək no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ" i tajwan. misiɾsiɾaj mikawit ʦi wo~u~u sħəŋxian (sin taiwan ħəpiŋ kikiŋkaj a ʦo~u~uanjiən) ===== mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar =====
